sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112717" key="fusiopoie/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠσιοποιέω</orth>, <sense id="n112717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remould as by a second nature,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
